---
title: '#Artichoke in Bloom in #FortWorth'
date: '2016-05-29T04:01:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6819309446593980497'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/artichoke-in-bloom-in-fortworth.html'

categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0530151449-765988-b211fcfe0b42.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6154754564530238242" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0530151449-765988-30687d8222df.jpg" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: small; text-align: start;">#Artichoke in Bloom in #FortWorth</span></td></tr>
</tbody></table>

</div>
<br />
